title: pristiglottis fimbriata
intro: Pristiglottis fimbriata, also known as the golden lip orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Pristiglottis fimbriata has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pristiglottis fimbriata are said to include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough, and support respiratory health. Pristiglottis fimbriata is often prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal uses.
